svg.title: SENTINEL full integrated architecture with all sponsors and data sources
svg.desc: Six-layer architecture showing data sources, ingestion, knowledge base, correlation engine, AI synthesis, and operator interface with ElevenLabs, OpenAI, and Meta integrations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What cyber event types does SENTINEL ingest?')
sendPrompt('What physical sensors feed SENTINEL?')

sendPrompt('How does the SENTINEL ingestion layer normalize events?')
g.text: parse · dedupe · tag domain/type/location/time · embed (OpenAI ada-002) · write SQLite
